channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Democrats' outgoing chair says Trump's win forces party to reassess how it reaches voters
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — As he concludes his time as chairman of the Democratic National Committee, Jaime Harrison is downplaying his party’s November loss to President-elect Donald Trump and arguing Democrats avoided even greater losses that parties in power have faced around the world.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wave of Democrats slam Biden's pardon of his son Hunter
item.description: While some Democrats extended a measure of sympathy, President Biden has taken heat on several fronts.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trudeau told Trump Americans would also suffer if tariffs are imposed, a Canadian minister says
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Prime Minister Justin Trudeau told Donald Trump that Americans would also suffer if the president-elect follows through on a plan to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products, a Canadian minister who attended their recent dinner said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White House says Trump wouldn't 'let go' of Hunter Biden in defending pardon
item.description: The White House on Monday defended President Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter Biden after insisting for more than a year that he wouldn’t do so.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here are the times that Biden, the White House said they wouldn’t pardon Hunter
item.description: President Biden and the White House have emphatically insisted the president wouldn’t pardon his son, Hunter Biden.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden pardons his son Hunter despite previous pledges not to
item.description: President Joe Biden has pardoned his son, Hunter, sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family members.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, WFLA, NBC
